results.claim: Are there Aliens living on earth
results.summary: There is no credible scientific evidence that aliens are living on Earth. All major scientific institutions, space agencies, and government investigations have found no verified proof of extraterrestrial beings on our planet. The search for life in the universe continues, but the claim that aliens currently reside on Earth remains unsupported by any authoritative source.
key_evidence: NASA's ongoing Search for Life program indicates they are still searching—no discovery has been made.
U.S. government UAP investigations (AARO, Pentagon reports) have not attributed any phenomena to alien origin.
Scientific consensus: No peer-reviewed evidence of extraterrestrial life on Earth exists.
SETI Institute continues searching for signals from space—no confirmed contact.

Source: SETI Institute. URL: https://www.seti.org/. Reliability: High.

*(For the claim that aliens ARE living on Earth)*

- **None found.** No credible scientific source, government agency, or peer-reviewed publication has confirmed extraterrestrial beings living on Earth.

There is **no credible scientific evidence** that aliens are living on Earth. All major scientific institutions, space agencies, and government investigations have found no verified proof of extraterrestrial beings on our planet. While the search for life in the universe continues, the claim that aliens currently reside on Earth remains unsupported by any authoritative source.
